name: rag-long-in
description: Prefill-heavy retrieval-augmented traffic: long stuffed-context prompts (uniform 2048-8192 tokens), short grounded answers capped at 512 tokens. Stresses prefill compute and admission of large requests; the low rate keeps offered prefill work per second comparable to chat-short's total token throughput. Canonical suite v1 (IB-T003).
